prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约8114→7577→7909→7356→6590，整体呈波动下行趋势，近3年累计前移约1319名；2025年基准约6590名，为近5年最佳位次；该校在湖北省物理类招生计划2021年104人、2022年93人、2023年95人、2024年98人、2025年106人，呈逐年小幅扩招态势；2026年计划120人，较2025年扩招约13.2%，扩招幅度明显，将加剧竞争、推低位次。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流高校；软科主榜2026年约第37名，近年稳定在35–37名区间，属全国顶尖211梯队，综合实力接近中游985；2025年高考周期声誉评价偏正面，投档线稳步提升、入选国家卓越工程师学院、保研率升至27%；2026年周期内出现实验室安全事故偏负面信号，但整体关注度一般；抖音热度排名第61（一般），短视频曝光量中等；航空宇航科学与技术A-、力学A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、控制科学与工程A-、软件工程A-、信息与通信工程A-，共7个A-及以上学科，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信（高热推荐）、电气工程（高热推荐）、计算机类（推荐）等南航核心专业社会热度高；湖北省2026年普通高考总人数约39.37万，较2025年物理类+历史类合计约39.12万略有增加，竞争小幅加剧；省控线物理类本科批2025年426分，较2024年437分略降；南京航空航天大学位于江苏南京，属长三角热门地域；该校在湖北省招生占比约2.5%–3%，非本地高校但跨省吸引力较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动下行趋势、2026年物理类扩招约13.2%带来的竞争加剧、学校声誉正面但实验室安全事故略有影响、湖北省考生总数小幅增加、核心工科专业社会热度高等因素，在2025年基准6590名基础上预计位次后移；预测最低位次约7082名，区间6582–7582名。

一档（最难进）
- 航空航天类（飞行器设计与工程等）
- 人工智能
- 电子信息类
- 自动化
- 软件工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）

- 信息安全

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

- 核工程类

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间6582–7582名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业（航空航天类、电子信息类）冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<6582名）可重点冲击一档；位次接近区间上限（>7582名）应以三档为主、二档为辅。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 8114 → 7577 → 7909 → 7356 → 6590, showing an overall fluctuating downward trend, with a cumulative forward shift of about 1319 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 6590, the best ranking in the last 5 years; the university's enrollment plan in Hubei for Physics Category was 104 in 2021, 93 in 2022, 95 in 2023, 98 in 2024, and 106 in 2025, showing a gradual small-scale expansion; the 2026 plan is 120, an increase of about 13.2% compared to 2025, a significant expansion that will intensify competition and push the ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 37th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the 35–37 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier 211 echelon, with comprehensive strength close to mid-tier 985; the reputation evaluation during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle was relatively positive, with steadily increasing admission scores, selection for the National Excellent Engineer Academy, and a graduate school recommendation rate rising to 27%; during the 2026 cycle, a laboratory safety accident sent a somewhat negative signal, but overall attention was average; Douyin popularity ranked 61st (average), with moderate short video exposure; Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology A-, Mechanics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, Software Engineering A-, Information and Communication Engineering A-, a total of 7 A- and above disciplines, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Electrical Engineering (highly recommended), Computer Science (recommended) and other core majors of NUAA have high social popularity; the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Hubei in 2026 is about 393,700, a slight increase from the combined total of about 391,200 for Physics and History categories in 2025, leading to a slight intensification of competition; the provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 426 points, slightly down from 437 points in 2024; Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a popular region in the Yangtze River Delta; the university's enrollment proportion in Hubei is about 2.5%–3%, not a local university but with strong cross-provincial appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating downward trend of historical rankings, the intensified competition due to the approximately 13.2% expansion in Physics Category in 2026, the positive school reputation but slight impact from the laboratory safety accident, the small increase in the total number of candidates in Hubei, and the high social popularity of core engineering majors, the ranking is expected to shift backward based on the 2025 baseline of 6590; the predicted minimum ranking is about 7082, with a range of 6582–7582.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Aerospace (Aircraft Design and Engineering, etc.)
- Artificial Intelligence
- Electronic Information
- Automation
- Software Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)

- Robotics Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Mechanical Engineering
- Industrial Design
- Applied Statistics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 6582–7582, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Aerospace, Electronic Information) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<6582), you can focus on Tier 1; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>7582), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors, supplemented by Tier 2.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年历史类最低位次约2904→2891→3124→3616→3324，整体波动后移，近3年累计后移约420名；2025年基准约3324名；该校在湖北省历史类招生计划2021年3人、2022年4人、2023年4人、2024年6人、2025年8人，持续扩招；2026年计划15人，较2025年扩招87.5%，扩招幅度极大，将显著推低位次。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流高校；软科主榜约第37名，属顶尖211，但该校以理工科见长，历史类招生专业较少；2025年高考周期声誉偏正面（投档线稳步提升）；2026年周期出现实验室安全事故偏负面信号，但主要影响物理类；抖音热度一般，历史类关注度有限；该校历史类招生专业（英语、日语、法学、金融、工商管理）与学校优势学科（航空宇航、力学、机械等）关联度低，学科评估优势不直接覆盖文科专业。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 外语类专业热度一般观望，法学分化观望，金融/财经分化观望；湖北省2026年历史类考生估算约14.25万，较2025年14.14万略有增加；省控线历史类本科批2025年442分，较2024年432分略升；南京位于长三角，对湖北考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校历史类招生占比极小（约0.1%–0.2%），非主要生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年历史类扩招87.5%带来的竞争大幅加剧、学校声誉正面但文科专业非优势领域、湖北省历史类考生小幅增加等因素，在2025年基准3324名基础上预计位次明显后移；预测最低位次约5089名，区间4589–5589名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间4589–5589名内，历史类招生专业仅5个且均为文科类，建议以二档英语/工商管理为主力、一档法学/金融学冲刺、三档日语保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<4589名）可重点冲法学；位次接近区间上限（>5589名）应以日语保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2904 → 2891 → 3124 → 3616 → 3324, showing an overall backward shift, with a cumulative backward shift of about 420 places in the last three years; the 2025 baseline is about 3324 places; the enrollment plan for History Category in Hubei Province was 3 in 2021, 4 in 2022, 4 in 2023, 6 in 2024, and 8 in 2025, with continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is 15, an increase of 87.5% compared to 2025, a very large expansion that will significantly push down the ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked about 37th in the Soft Science main ranking, belonging to the top tier of 211 universities, but the university is strong in science and engineering, with few majors in History Category; in the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation is slightly positive (admission scores steadily rising); in the 2026 cycle, there is a slightly negative signal from a laboratory safety incident, but it mainly affects the Physics Category; Douyin popularity is average, with limited attention to History Category; the majors offered in History Category (English, Japanese, Law, Finance, Business Administration) have low correlation with the university's advantageous disciplines (Aeronautics and Astronautics, Mechanics, Machinery, etc.), and the discipline evaluation advantages do not directly cover liberal arts majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Foreign language majors are generally lukewarm, Law is divided and wait-and-see, Finance/Economics is divided and wait-and-see; the estimated number of History Category examinees in Hubei Province in 2026 is about 142,500, a slight increase from 141,400 in 2025; the provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 442 points, slightly up from 432 points in 2024; Nanjing is located in the Yangtze River Delta, which has some cross-provincial appeal to Hubei examinees; the proportion of History Category enrollment at this university is very small (about 0.1%–0.2%), and it is not a major source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the trend of backward shift in historical rankings, the significant intensification of competition due to the 87.5% expansion of History Category enrollment in 2026, the positive school reputation but non-advantageous liberal arts majors, and the slight increase in History Category examinees in Hubei Province, the ranking is expected to shift significantly backward from the 2025 baseline of 3324; the predicted minimum ranking is about 5089, with a range of 4589–5589.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 4589–5589, there are only 5 majors in History Category, all liberal arts; it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 English/Business Administration as the main choices, aim for Tier 1 Law/Finance as reach options, and use Tier 3 Japanese as a safety; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<4589), focus on reaching for Law; if the ranking is near the upper limit (>5589), use Japanese as a safety.
